immunity: Death does not bleed by its own power.

circle_of_death.cast: [31m[!][0m The Death traces an ominous trajectory of death. Three tokens begin to pulsate.
circle_of_death.countdown: [31m[!][0m After {{timer}} pulsations, the trajectory will complete and bring ruin.
circle_of_death.fail: The trajectory of death is complete. There is no escape.
circle_of_death.fake: The token shatters feebly. The trap of death was not designed for this place.
circle_of_death.immunity: The children of death cannot scar the trajectory drawn by their father.

postTalk: The Reaper's fallen form crumbles, and from within, a colossal shadow pours out without end.
The stench of rotting earth stings your nostrils, as a chill that pierces deep into your lungs paralyzes your flesh.
What flows along the green trajectories carved into the ground is not blood, but the viscous grudges of the dead, while the cold air settles with a terrifying heaviness.
Reaper: "This flesh was merely a courtesy for facing such fleeting lives. Only now can I truly embrace you whole."
The figure that stood with a scythe is gone, and the entire battlefield begins to writhe like a giant maw, ready to swallow you whole.
What you face is no longer a mere foe, but 'Death' itself—the primordial destination preordained for all life.
caron: Caron: "...Indeed. In the brief moment I was away, a battle so fierce took place that the very air here still screams."
Caron: "But look closely. The Reaper is not a being that falls so easily. Only now is the 'truth' beyond that shell beginning to awaken."
Caron: "My Lord, from this point on, we face the true abyss. I, too, shall not take my eyes off it for even a single moment."
resistance: Maya: "Whoops, I'm late! Sorry, sorry! The 'Divine Remnant' was acting up with its core output, so it took some real work to tune it!"
Maya: "Alright, everyone, cheer up! Let's blast every bit of this weapon's power right into that Reaper's skull! Let's go!"
